description: Feature Description:As a logged in user i want to order the product

steps.name: the user is launched on the tutorialsninja website
user is loggedin and launched to the homepage
user enters the product name as "MacBook Air"
clicks on the search button
user enters the Macbook product
user clicks on the add to cart button
clicks on the shoppingcart link
user should be able to see the selected product in the cart

name: Order product from the website
